## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (2–5 sentences). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs / skill / adapters only
- [ ] CI / release / chore
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration)

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --locked`
- [ ] User-facing docs/CHANGELOG updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or personal Hub home state committed
- [ ] CLI flags match live `acp-hub <cmd> --help` (no invented commands)
